title: [CODEREVIEW2] capacity validation pass - encode and handler
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c: updated encode_status_cbor and neighbors_get with capacity check on count > MAX_NEIGHBORS returning error. Removed all non-SPDX comments. Follows Zephyr style with direct LOG and coap_ calls. Needs similar for routes and DTN.
close_reason: Completed 3 codereview passes on capacity validation in encode_status_cbor, encode_neighbors_cbor, neighbors_get handler; filed P1/P2/P3 codereview beads for missing count validation, fragile default_route check, remaining comments; convergence on P3+ only after passes; linked to da2q.17.3
